benefits.name: Uber Cash
benefits.description: Monthly Uber Cash credits for Uber rides and Uber Eats orders ($15/month, $35 in December). Enrollment required

benefits.name: Saks Fifth Avenue Credit
benefits.description: Statement credits for purchases at Saks Fifth Avenue (up to $50 per semi-annual period). Enrollment required

benefits.name: Digital Entertainment Credit
benefits.description: Monthly statement credits for eligible digital entertainment purchases including ESPN+, Disney+, Hulu, Paramount+, Peacock, The New York Times, The Wall Street Journal, YouTube Premium, and YouTube TV. Enrollment required

benefits.name: Airline Fee Credit
benefits.description: Statement credit for incidental airline fees with one qualifying airline. Enrollment required, and you must select a qualifying airline

benefits.name: Hotel Credit
benefits.description: Up to $300 back in statement credits semi-annually on prepaid Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection bookings through Amex Travel. Minimum 2-night stay required with The Hotel Collection. You don’t need to complete the stay in the period where you used the credit. Enrollment required

benefits.name: Resy Dining Credit
benefits.description: Up to $100 in statement credits each quarter after using the card to make eligible purchases at Resy-affiliated restaurants. Restaurant gift cards purchased online via Toast or at the restaurant also qualify for the credit. Enrollment required

benefits.name: Lululemon Credit
benefits.description: Up to $75 back in statement credits each quarter for eligible purchases at retail and online Lululemon locations in the U.S. Physical gift cards purchased on line or in store are eligible. Enrollment required

benefits.name: Equinox Credit
benefits.description: Up to $300 in statement credits each calendar year for Equinox+ digital subscription or Equinox club membership. Enrollment required

benefits.name: Walmart+ Credit
benefits.description: Monthly statement credit for Walmart+ membership. Enrollment required

benefits.name: Centurion Lounge Access
benefits.description: Complimentary access to Centurion Lounges and partner lounges worldwide, for cardholder only

benefits.name: Priority Pass Select
benefits.description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select membership with access to 1,300+ lounges worldwide

benefits.name: Delta Sky Club Access
benefits.description: 10 complimentary visits per year to Delta Sky Club when flying Delta, excluding Basic Economy (February 1 - January 31)

benefits.name: CLEAR+ Credit
benefits.description: Statement credit for CLEAR+ Membership (subject to auto-renewal). Sign up and pay with your Platinum Card to receive up to $209 in statement credits per calendar year. Enrollment required

benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck Credit
benefits.description: Statement credit for Global Entry application fee up to $120 or TSA PreCheck application fee when charged to the card

benefits.name: Marriott Gold Elite Status
benefits.description: With Marriott Bonvoy® Gold Elite status, you can receive upgrades to enhanced rooms upon check-in when available. Available at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy when booked with a Qualifying Rate. Enrollment required

benefits.name: Dell Technologies Credit

benefits.name: Wireless Telephone Credit
benefits.description: Monthly statement credits for wireless phone service purchases with U.S. wireless providers. Enrollment required

benefits.name: Adobe Credit
benefits.description: Statement credit per calendar year after you spend $600+ on U.S. purchases directly with Adobe. Enrollment required
